evidence: Results-driven Heavy Equipment Operator with 5+ years of experience operating excavators, backhoes, and other heavy equipment in construction and maintenance settings.
+ Conducted pre-operational checks on equipment before each use, ensuring compliance with OSHA regulations
+ Loaded and unloaded materials from the excavator bucket or bed, maintaining a clean and organized work area
+ Operated hydraulic excavators, including Caterpillar 349F and Komatsu PC200-6, to dig foundations, trenches, and other excavation sites
